title: mentha × rolandi
intro: Mentha × rolandi, also known as Pearleaf Mint, is a hybrid species of mint plant, created by crossing Mentha pulegium with Mentha × piperita. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of menthone and menthyl acetate, which have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha × rolandi include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Mentha × rolandi can be made into teas, essential oils, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
